startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: I bid you salutations, passer-by.
Perhaps your expectations went awry?
The management herein has realigned.
Which is to say, that now it's mine.

startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Perhaps you'd like to play yourself a game?
Regardless of your answer, it's the same.
Now that you're here, the hand's been dealt.
The river flows across the felt.

startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Now hold your hoarfrost; I'm benevolent.
I am prepared to pay you for your efforts spent.
For each right answer I'll bestow a prize;
And each wrong answer gets another try.

startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: In each round I'll have a card in mind;
Your task has thusly been assigned:
To match my answer is your predetermined fate;
Start with a guess and I'll evaluate.

startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: The parts that are alike I'll mark with ✅'s.
Where yours and mine diverge, I'll answer ❌.
A little bit of both means 🔶 will show.
And ⬆️ or ⬇️ tells you which way to go.

startup.speaker: Edelstein
lines: So go ahead and prove you're made of tougher stuff.
Starting from nothing,
Like diamonds in the rough.

hint.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Your artfulness leaves something to be desired.
Unlike __ILLUST__, who art in __EDCOUNT__ edition(s) is inspired.

hint.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Cool down, no need to overheat.
This card's effect is pretty neat:
「__TEXT__」

hint.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Your impatience is not a rarity.
But what is a rarity is __RARITY__,
Which is where this card appears in __SET__

hint.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Still frozen? Let me share a little lore.
In one of __EDCOUNT__ edition(s), you'll see this flavor:
「__FLAVOR__」

nohints.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Don't test my patience.
I've no more hints to give for this one.

spoiler1.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Your efforts on this game must be commended;
Your guesswork on that card was splendid.
And since we've reached a kind of lull,
Allow me now to introduce myself in full.

spoiler2.speaker: Edelstein
lines: You dare to think you've earned a new windfall?
Then go and find your spoiler lost amidst the squall.
I see, I seem icy indeed.
A hint at least, I can concede.

spoiler2.speaker: Edelstein
lines: It's hidden in the greater site,
Where you would see the cards that might
Evade typical players' sight.

spoiler3.speaker: Edelstein
lines: Now, I suppose I can grant one last prize.
But not directly, no surprise.
Again as to its whereabouts I'll allude,
And leave the rest up to your aptitude.

spoiler3.speaker: Edelstein
lines: The place where you'll be Sighting it's atop a list
Of a type where this one's most Suited to exist.
